hero.title: Qualified Tutoring in Mühlacker
hero.subtitle: Support from Mühlacker — for Mühlacker! We personally guide students on their path to academic success.

about.intro: We are Mehmet and Ali — two qualified engineers from Mühlacker with a mission: to provide students with the best possible support. With over 5 years of experience and more than 50 satisfied students, we personally stand for quality.

mehmet.name: Mehmet Futsi
mehmet.description: Qualified engineer and laser technology expert. Makes complex scientific topics easy to understand and gives students both knowledge and confidence.

ali.name: Ali Bilen
ali.description: Engineer and PhD candidate in production engineering. Expert in natural sciences and mathematics. Supports students with individual learning strategies and targeted exam preparation.

nachhilfe.title: Tutoring
nachhilfe.description: Individual tutoring in all subjects — Mathematics, Natural Sciences, German, English, French and Spanish. From primary school to the Abitur.

pruefung.title: Exam Preparation
pruefung.description: Targeted preparation for the Abitur, Realschulabschluss and Hauptschulabschluss. We develop a study plan together and practise exam-relevant tasks.

bewerbung.title: Application Coaching
bewerbung.description: Professional support with job applications — from preparing your documents to getting ready for interviews.

pricing.subtitle: Transparent and fair — the more often, the better the value.

twice.title: 2x per week
features: For students with regular support needs

thrice.title: 3x per week
features: For larger gaps across multiple subjects

items.name: Parent review
items.text: Thanks to BFM, my son improved his maths grade from a 5 to a 2. The individual support is excellent!

items.name: Student review
items.text: Super friendly tutors who really take the time. I feel much more confident at school now.

items.name: Parent review
items.text: Very professional and reliable. The exam preparation helped my daughter a great deal. Highly recommended!

partners.subtitle: We work with local institutions and are a recognised provider of publicly funded tutoring.

social.title: Follow us on Social Media!
social.subtitle: Study tips, learning hacks and insights into our tutoring — follow us on Instagram and TikTok!

items.question: Which subjects do you offer?
items.answer: We offer tutoring in all common school subjects: Mathematics, Natural Sciences (Physics, Chemistry, Biology), German, English, French and Spanish.

items.question: How does a free taster day work?
items.answer: During the free taster day we get to know the student, assess their current level and create an individual study plan. The taster day is completely free and non-binding.

items.question: Where does the tutoring take place?
items.answer: Tutoring takes place at our location at Philipp-Bauer-Weg 2 in Mühlacker.

items.question: Can I change the frequency?
items.answer: Yes, of course. You can switch between our packages (1x, 2x or 3x per week) at any time. Just get in touch with us.

items.question: Are there long contract periods?
items.answer: No! We don't have long contracts. You can cancel by mid-month for the end of that month — flexible and fair.

trial.title: Free Taster Day!
trial.subtitle: Get to know us with no obligations — your child can attend a full day of lessons for free.

cookies.message: This website uses Google Maps. By using this website, you agree to data processing by Google.

contact.subtitle: Do you have questions or would you like to arrange a trial lesson? Write to us!

sections.heading: 1. Controller
sections.text:
The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:

Mehmet Futsi & Ali Bilen GbR
Philipp-Bauer-Weg 2
75417 Mühlacker
E-mail: info@bfm-muehlacker.de

sections.heading: 2. Collection and storage of personal data
sections.text: When you visit our website, information is automatically collected by the hosting provider (GitHub Pages). This data (server log files) includes the browser type, operating system, referrer URL, hostname of the accessing device and the time of the server request.

sections.heading: 3. Contact form
sections.text: If you send us enquiries via the contact form, your details from the form, including the contact information provided, will be stored with us for the purpose of processing the request. The contact form is processed via the Formspree service (formspree.io). Formspree stores your data in accordance with their privacy policy.

sections.heading: 4. Google Maps
sections.text: This website uses the Google Maps mapping service. The provider is Google Ireland Limited. Through the use of Google Maps, information about your use of this website may be transmitted to Google.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights
sections.text: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure and restriction of processing of your personal data. You also have the right to object to data processing and the right to data portability. To exercise your rights, please contact us at info@bfm-muehlacker.de.
